---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl
nocite: |
  @*
---

Below is a list of my published work. For working papers and works in progress,
see the [Research](research.qmd) page.

::: {.section-title}
Peer-Reviewed Articles
:::

::: {#refs}
:::

---

*Last updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %Y")`*
